one.heading: Code scanning at scale
one.description: Run detection across repositories with native workflows and security context built into the developer lifecycle.

two.heading: Fix issues before they slow delivery
two.description: Bring remediation guidance closer to pull requests and code review so teams can act earlier.

three.heading: Security where developers already work
three.description: Keep visibility, governance, and action in GitHub rather than spreading ownership across disconnected tools.

workflow.label: Features
workflow.heading: Security seamlessly integrated into your workflow

one.heading: Prevent accidental secret exposure.
one.description: Push protection automatically blocks secrets before they reach your repository, keeping code clean without disrupting workflows.

two.heading: Find and fix vulnerabilities.
two.description: Address security debt in your GitHub workflow with static analysis, AI remediation, and proactive vulnerability management.

customerStories.label: Customer stories
customerStories.heading: Securing the entire software supply chain

one.heading: Scale strategy with GitHub Security Lab
one.description: Secure open source by finding vulnerabilities, building tools like CodeQL, and advancing security research.

two.heading: Stay ahead with Security Advisory Database
two.description: Access a vulnerability database of CVEs and GitHub-curated security advisories from the open source world.

three.heading: Secure software supply chains end-to-end
three.description: Reduce risks with automated updates, dependency tracking, and build attestation for a secure lifecycle.
